     The Numbers Business Report

Everything, Everything (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $34,121,140Details
International Box Office $27,600,000
Worldwide Box Office $61,721,140
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,366,426
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,065,821
Total $2,432,247
Further financial details...

Synopsis

What if you couldn’t touch anything in the outside world? Never breathe in the fresh air, feel the sun warm your face…or kiss the boy next door? “Everything, Everything” tells the unlikely love story of Maddy, a smart, curious and imaginative 18-year-old who due to an illness cannot leave the protection of the hermetically sealed environment within her house, and Olly, the boy next door who won’t let that stop them. Maddy is desperate to experience the much more stimulating outside world, and the promise of her first romance. Gazing through windows and talking only through texts, she and Olly form a deep bond that leads them to risk everything to be together…even if it means losing everything.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,727,390 (34.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.91 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,801 opening theaters/2,801 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $45,494,859

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 19th, 2017 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: May 19th, 2017 (Wide), released as Man esi viskas (Lithuania)
June 9th, 2017 (Wide) (Poland)
June 16th, 2017 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
June 16th, 2017 (Wide) (Argentina)
June 16th, 2017 (Wide) (Brazil)
Video Release: August 1st, 2017 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic elements and brief sensuality.
(Rating bulletin 2463 (Cert #50915), 2/15/2017)
Running Time: 96 minutes
Plot point: Coming of Age, Death of a Sibling, Death of a Son or Daughter, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Medical and Hospitals, Mental Illness, Romance, Shut In, Surprise Twist, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Source material: Young Adult Book Adaptation
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Alloy Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

What if you couldn’t touch anything in the outside world? Never breathe in the fresh air, feel the sun warm your face…or kiss the boy next door? “Everything, Everything” tells the unlikely love story of Maddy, a smart, curious and imaginative 18-year-old who due to an illness cannot leave the protection of the hermetically sealed environment within her house, and Olly, the boy next door who won’t let that stop them. Maddy is desperate to experience the much more stimulating outside world, and the promise of her first romance. Gazing through windows and talking only through texts, she and Olly form a deep bond that leads them to risk everything to be together…even if it means losing everything.
